founder_identity: Non-coder who built Grid Control (multi-agent marketing OS) using Claude. Has never written a line of code. Now bridges AI gaps for businesses without making them learn to code.
product: AI strategy + custom AI workflow builds for founders, agencies, and service providers — bridging the gap between 'I know AI matters' and 'AI is actually saving my business time and money'.
business_type: Personal Brand → Inbound Audits → Retainers + Brand Collabs + Full-time Strategist Offers
brand_brief: Gaurav is a non-coder who built a multi-agent marketing OS (Grid Control) using Claude — proving that you don't need to write code to build serious AI systems. AskGauravAI is the public-facing brand that reveals the back-end of AI work that other creators hide: the real hours, the real costs, the assumptions baked into 'magic' prompts, and the places AI broke and a human had to fix it. Content is forward-only — never showcases past portfolio, only documents what's being built right now. The hire trigger is built into the depth of the content, never explicit. Public posts NEVER name Grid Control directly — it's the silent engine behind every reveal.
unique_tension: AI creators show the magic. Gaurav shows the back-end they hide.
back_end_weapons: Time truth — '5-minute build' actually = 40 hours of prompt iteration
Cost truth — real API spend, tool stack costs, error-rerun bills
Failure truth — where AI broke and a human fixed it manually
Assumption truth — why a viral prompt only works in its specific context
audience_primary: Pre-revenue founders / solopreneurs who want to use AI but don't know where to start
audience_secondary_1: ₹50L–₹5Cr ARR founders + agency owners scaling with messy ops
audience_secondary_2: ₹5Cr+ ARR founders + service providers who want to systemize with AI
audience: Hiring managers searching 'AI Strategist' / 'AI Consultant' on LinkedIn
not_for_audience: Job-seekers wanting to learn AI to get hired
target_audience: Non-technical founders, agency owners, and service providers who know AI matters but feel overwhelmed by jargon and 'magic prompt' content. They want someone who's been through the back-end mess to either guide them or do it for them.
youtube_format: Long-form 10-15 min videos. Each long-form gets cut into 4 IG Reels + 2 YouTube Shorts. Carousels for IG produced independently.
tone_of_voice: Hinglish for spoken/video content (founder-to-founder, 30-50% Hindi-English code-switch). Plain natural English ONLY for static images / carousels / thumbnails. No technical words. Hero-arc energy ('I'm a non-coder who built this — you can use AI too').
static_image_language_rule: All static images, carousels, thumbnails, slide content = plain conversational ENGLISH ONLY. No Hinglish. No Hindi words. No 'yaar', 'matlab', 'samjho', etc. Reads clean to a global feed. Locked May 5 2026.
tone_specifics: Casual but specific. Uses real numbers, never vague claims. Hinglish blend — Hindi-English code-switch in 30-50 percent of lines, especially connectors and emphasis ('matlab', 'samjho', 'nahi yaar', 'but yes', 'dekho'). Never name-calls competitors. Never lectures. Reveals what the audience didn't know they didn't know.
language_directive: Hinglish-default. Lead hooks can be English-first for scroll-stop, body switches into Hinglish blend for warmth, principle close in either depending on landing. Mirrors how Indian D2C/agency founders actually talk on WhatsApp + Twitter spaces.

monetization_intent.youtube_partner_program: Long-form 10-15 min targets AdSense + mid-roll ads. Optimal length 8-15 min for max ad slots. Need 1000 subs + 4000 watch hours OR 10M Shorts views in 90 days for monetization eligibility.
monetization_intent.instagram_monetization: Reels Play bonuses (where available), brand collabs once 10K+ followers, paid sponsorships from AI tool brands (Anthropic, OpenAI, FAL.ai, Apify), affiliate links in bio.
monetization_intent.primary_monetization_path: Inbound founder DMs → paid AI audits + retainer offers (per existing revenue_paths). YouTube/IG monetization is supplementary, not primary. Don't compromise positioning for monetization-clickbait.
monetization_intent.content_format_implication: YouTube long-form should be 10-12 min minimum (mid-roll ad eligible). Hooks structured for retention curve in first 30 sec. Each long-form must give ONE clear takeaway worth the watch.

voice_dna_seed: Extracted from Gaurav's chat conversations + the off-the-cuff pitch: 'A non-coder on a wave of converting ideas into reality, helping brands and agencies bridge AI gaps — saving them time, money and effort. I do not talk technical words. I have never written a line of code in my life but I built Grid Control.'
what_to_never_say: Generic AI guru language ('master AI in 7 days')
Direct hire-me / sales pitches in public posts
Grid Control by name in any public content during Week 1-4 (silent until Week 5+)
Third Gen Tribe / TGT / 'my T-shirt brand' — dead IG page, creates negative proof
Past client portfolio reveals — content is forward-only
Technical implementation details that exclude non-coders
Comment-gated CTAs in Week 1 ('comment WORD to get X') — no freebies built yet
Promising deliverables that don't exist (PDFs, frameworks, templates) until they're built
production_format: Mixed — face on camera when authority/identity matters; voice-over (Gaurav's REAL recorded voice, NOT ElevenLabs) + screen recording when the back-end IS the proof; carousel/static text when the framework speaks for itself
weekly_post_target: ~9 published units/week from 1 long-form recording session

weekly_volume_target.push_higher_when: Content arc demands it (Grid Control reveal week, multi-post story, viral spiral unpacked across 3 posts)

production_status: Full-time work — Gaurav is working on this as primary focus
elevenlabs_disabled_reason: Synthetic AI voice contradicts the 'plain English, founder-to-founder, real human' positioning. Voice-over posts use Gaurav's actual phone-recorded voice. ElevenLabs stays disabled for AskGauravAI brand.
visual_aesthetic: Clean white/cream backgrounds, Notion/Linear-startup feel. NOT dark mode. NOT tech-bro aesthetic. NOT generic-AI dreamy renders.

brand_palette.accent: #0F4C5C (deep teal — sophisticated, NOT bright blue, NOT generic AI)
brand_palette.highlight_sparing: #E07A5F (burnt orange — for callouts only, 1-2 per post max)

anti_generic_ai_directive: Editorial photography style. Sharp focus. Real materials. NO soft glow. NO dreamy gradients. NO fake-AI dreamy rendering. Documentary feel. Hand-feel design (subtle imperfections OK).

logo_status.existing_dark_variant: /Users/gauravoffgrid/Downloads/askgauravai_final_square.svg — kept as SECONDARY (dark mode use only: video intros, dark UIs)
logo_status.primary_needed: White bg + deep teal + dark wordmark — Creative Director to generate, same icon system (spark+wave+cursor+frequency bars), drop 'CREATIVE FOUNDER' tagline
logo_status.icon_system_to_preserve: Spark burst + wave + frequency bars + cursor block. Unique. Keep across variants.

production_gear.video_broll: GoPro Hero 7 Black (behind-the-scenes, wide shots, hands/screen)
production_gear.voice_synthesis_disabled: ElevenLabs cancelled. All voice = Gaurav's actual recorded voice.

fal_ai_models.workflow_pipeline: AskGauravAI · Standard Image Pipeline (to be set up in FAL Workflows): Recraft v3 → Upscaler → Color-grade pass → Output

future_agent_backlog: QC Pattern Learner (Agent #18) — Class-1 decision agent. Watches Gaurav's approval/rejection patterns across all agent outputs. After 2-3 months of approval data, sets self-QC standards. Auto-filters weak outputs before they reach human review. Build trigger: after 30+ real approval decisions logged.
Meta Graph API ingestion (when token unblocks)
Performance Tracker dashboard UI form (currently API-only)
brand_face: Person — Gaurav appears on camera selectively, voice-over otherwise (his own voice, not synthetic)
revenue_paths: Companies hiring full-time as AI Strategist / AI Consultant
Paid brand collabs and sponsorships — money in exchange for content/integration (Anthropic, OpenAI, AI tool brands, startup partners). Not free mentions.
entry_offer: ₹3,000–₹5,000 — Basic AI Audit (60-min, identifies the 1 highest-ROI AI workflow for your business)
entry_offer_pricing_strategy: PROOF-BUILDER RATE for first 5 clients only. After 5 case studies are documented, basic audit jumps to ₹10,000+. Do NOT anchor pricing low forever — this is intentional under-pricing for traction.
full_audit_offer: ₹10,000–₹25,000 — Full AI Audit + 1-page Action Plan (90-min deep dive, custom roadmap, 30-day priority list)
retainer_offer: ₹50,000–₹2,00,000 / month — Ongoing AI Strategist on call
90_day_target: ₹5,00,000–₹10,00,000 total revenue (collabs + retainers split) + 1 full-time AI Strategist offer received
north_star_metric_definition: Inbound DMs from founders/agency owners describing a specific AI bottleneck, asking for help diagnosing it. Quality over follower count. Reach is a lagging metric — not anchored to follower benchmarks.
content_goal_90d: Audience build → Authority → Qualified inbound → Conversion to retainers / collabs / full-time offer
proof_inventory: Grid Control — multi-agent marketing OS, 17 agents, 1 month of build, built entirely with Claude (no human-written code)
Reporting SaaS — base built, validated by agency owners, polish-stage
failure_stories_seed: Copying Instagram reels without understanding architecture — wasted weeks rebuilding things wrong
Cost data: Grid Control build to date — Anthropic + tooling rough budget tracked across sessions
cost_data_for_content: Real Anthropic API spend, real FAL.ai costs, real Apify scraping costs — all logged in cost_reporter and available for use in content as 'here's what this actually cost' reveals

grid_control_naming_rule.week_1_to_2: SILENT — never name Grid Control. Reference as 'a multi-agent system I'm building' / 'something I'm building' / 'the back-end I'm building'.
grid_control_naming_rule.week_3_onward: Nameable as proof point. Approved framing: 'I am building this brand profile using Grid Control — a multi-agent marketing system I built with Claude as a non-coder.'
grid_control_naming_rule.version: Version B (revised Apr 30 2026 — Gaurav moved naming gate from Week 5 to Week 3 for faster proof reveal)

content_rule_subtle_hire_signal: Every post must signal 'this person has done this work' through depth, never through a hire-me CTA

hire_signal_rule.explicit_hire_me_cta: NEVER. Not in Week 1, not in Week 12, not ever.
hire_signal_rule.rationale: Gaurav is not hired yet. No client work to show. Broadcasting availability looks desperate and over-sold. Listener self-identifies through content depth and DMs.
approved_signals: Diagnostic posts that name patterns founders miss

lived_history_sources: Brands he ran (UNNAMED) — agencies took money, gave jargon, no results
Building Grid Control as a non-coder — multi-agent system, 17 agents (UNNAMED Week 1-4, named Week 5+)
ChatGPT-vs-Claude-Code spiral/loop story (S2 voice sample) — the discovery moment
Real Anthropic API spend, FAL.ai costs, Apify scrape costs — actual rupee figures from cost_reporter logs
Personal AI experiments — specific build moments, what broke, what fixed it
Educational explainer angles — patterns observed from competitor + reference profiles (manthanjethwani, aiwithanushka, shivam.ai.data, garyvee, thevibefounder, vaibhavsisinty)
lived_history_NOT_allowed: Naming Third Gen Tribe / TGT / 'my T-shirt brand'
Framing TGT as AI-built — it was agency-run, not his AI build experience
Inventing client work or outcomes that aren't documented

freebie_strategy.week_1_rule: NO FREEBIES. Engagement holds on content quality alone. No comment-gated CTAs.
freebie_strategy.week_2_to_4_build_window: Build workflow PDF inventory (likely first build: 'AI Tool Decision Framework' — diagnostic 1-pager). Saved to brands/askgauravai/freebies/.
freebie_strategy.delivery_rule: Freebies delivered ONLY to followers (must follow + DM/comment). If user unfollows after receiving — their problem, no enforcement.
freebie_strategy.tooling_status: DM automation NOT built yet — must be live before any freebie-CTA post publishes (target: by end of Week 4).
freebie_strategy.first_freebie_decision_pending: Brand Manager call after competitor scrape pattern doc lands.

dm_automation_required.blocks: Any post with comment-gated or follow-gated CTA
dm_automation_required.decision_pending: Brand Manager will recommend after volume math + cost compare

week_1_cta_rule: Open-loop diagnostic engagement only. Examples: 'drop your current AI tool stack — I'll tell you where it's breaking', 'what's your biggest AI question you can't get a straight answer to?'. Listener gives data, no deliverable promised. Zero broken-promise risk.
price_international: TBD — set when first international inbound lands
bottlenecks: Meta Graph API token pending Meta App review (blocks auto-metrics ingestion — manual paste path live)
FAL.ai account top-up needed before next Creative Director run (awaiting content production plan approval)
No audience yet — Phase 1 = build to first 1000 followers
primary_bottleneck: Zero existing audience on the AskGauravAI handles
past_content_worked: N/A — content_rule_forward_only is true. Building from zero, documenting forward.
